title: Business Analyst (Contract/Banking)
description:
• Application and Data Management: Collating and managing detailed information about applications within your assigned business vertical, including system interfaces, data content, and data storage.

  • Data Analysis: Performing in-depth data discovery and comparing data against existing reports to conduct thorough analysis to identify any data gaps.

  • Project Scope and Impact Assessment: Understanding project scope and changes, and supporting the Data PO in impact assessments to existing Production system and ensuring proper documentation for all decisions.

  • Requirements Management: Gathering, rationalizing, and communicating stakeholder requirements to the team.

  • Solutioning and Design: Collaborating with the team on solution design, focusing on long-term viability, standardization.

  • Data Mapping: Basing on Data Analysis work and User requirements, to deliver data mapping specifications from source files to the target tables / reports / metric / dashboard.

  • Testing Strategy and Execution: Assessing and proposing appropriate testing approaches and sign-off criteria, and actively performing User Acceptance Testing (UAT). Able to create Test Cases and perform the Testing using SQL scripting and excel is mandatory.

  • Documentation: Creating comprehensive documentation for data flow, design, business solutioning, and testing approaches, adhering to predefined templates.

  • Domain Knowledge: Basic banking products knowledge. Understanding of Wealth products/system (AVALOQ), Collaterals, Limits is an advantage.


Interested candidates may apply through the application system. We regret to inform only Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
